records.m_Talk_ENG: Come in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister? What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister? What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister? What brings you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wish to use Panorama outside of the theater?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wish to use Panorama outside of the theater?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wish to use Panorama outside of the theater?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you mad? Taking out the royal Curio without permission is a serious crime!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you mad? Taking out the royal Curio without permission is a serious crime!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you mad? Taking out the royal Curio without permission is a serious crime!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, it'll be fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, it'll be fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, it'll be fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hasn't your personal staff, Mary Jane, taken the entire day off today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hasn't your personal staff, Mary Jane, taken the entire day off today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hasn't your personal staff, Mary Jane, taken the entire day off today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It won't be a problem if we take one out quietly and return it before anyone notices.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It won't be a problem if we take one out quietly and return it before anyone notices.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It won't be a problem if we take one out quietly and return it before anyone notices.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's so reckless! This is my career on the line!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's so reckless! This is my career on the line!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's so reckless! This is my career on the line!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If someone sees me, it won't end well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If someone sees me, it won't end well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If someone sees me, it won't end well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Sees you? That's odd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Sees you? That's odd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Sees you? That's odd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought an actress of your stature could handle any role in any situation perfectly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought an actress of your stature could handle any role in any situation perfectly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought an actress of your stature could handle any role in any situation perfectly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's not on a stage prepared in advance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's not on a stage prepared in advance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's not on a stage prepared in advance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Oh, well. If you can't do it, I'll have to find another way
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Oh, well. If you can't do it, I'll have to find another way
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Oh, well. If you can't do it, I'll have to find another way
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you doubting my skills right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you doubting my skills right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you doubting my skills right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rude doesn't even describe your behavior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rude doesn't even describe your behavior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rude doesn't even describe your behavior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You just wait here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You just wait here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You just wait here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make you eat your words and apologize to me by getting that information!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make you eat your words and apologize to me by getting that information!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make you eat your words and apologize to me by getting that information!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This should be the fifth shop...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This should be the fifth shop...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This should be the fifth shop...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, it seems I got angry and got caught up in that man's tomfoolery again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, it seems I got angry and got caught up in that man's tomfoolery again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, it seems I got angry and got caught up in that man's tomfoolery again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Since it has already come to this, I'll make sure to flatten that snobby nose of his.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Since it has already come to this, I'll make sure to flatten that snobby nose of his.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Since it has already come to this, I'll make sure to flatten that snobby nose of his.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May the Lord's grace be with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: May the Lord's grace be with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: May the Lord's grace be with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, I heard that this shop handles Mana Stones...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, I heard that this shop handles Mana Stones...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, I heard that this shop handles Mana Stones...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a Supernatural?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a Supernatural?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a Supernatural?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not me, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not me, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not me, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Supernaturals inevitably need Mana Stones to survive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Supernaturals inevitably need Mana Stones to survive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Supernaturals inevitably need Mana Stones to survive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But most of them can't even afford to pay for one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But most of them can't even afford to pay for one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But most of them can't even afford to pay for one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the same for the middle class as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the same for the middle class as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the same for the middle class as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One day, if a family member suddenly becomes a Supernatural, then it's a quick fall to the lower class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One day, if a family member suddenly becomes a Supernatural, then it's a quick fall to the lower class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One day, if a family member suddenly becomes a Supernatural, then it's a quick fall to the lower class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some of the children being even abandoned to orphanages.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some of the children being even abandoned to orphanages.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some of the children being even abandoned to orphanages.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The church is running a small orphanage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The church is running a small orphanage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The church is running a small orphanage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And a few days ago, a child got a mark...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And a few days ago, a child got a mark...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And a few days ago, a child got a mark...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The priest suggested sending that child away before any problems arose...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The priest suggested sending that child away before any problems arose...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The priest suggested sending that child away before any problems arose...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the child was too young for us to not take in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the child was too young for us to not take in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the child was too young for us to not take in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all in vain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all in vain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all in vain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The price of Mana Stones keeps going up...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The price of Mana Stones keeps going up...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The price of Mana Stones keeps going up...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, that poor child will end back up on the streets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, that poor child will end back up on the streets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, that poor child will end back up on the streets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there is anything I can do for the child...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there is anything I can do for the child...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there is anything I can do for the child...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you trading in?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trading in?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trading in?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've brought a silver candle holder used for mass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've brought a silver candle holder used for mass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've brought a silver candle holder used for mass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The priest said it was over a hundred years old.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The priest said it was over a hundred years old.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The priest said it was over a hundred years old.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's authentic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's authentic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's authentic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Follow me quietly. I know a supplier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Follow me quietly. I know a supplier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Follow me quietly. I know a supplier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this place...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this place...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this place...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome to the temple of the Golden Dawn, pagan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome to the temple of the Golden Dawn, pagan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome to the temple of the Golden Dawn, pagan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Dawn?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Dawn?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Dawn?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How strange. I was told that there's only one national religion that was recognized in the kingdom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How strange. I was told that there's only one national religion that was recognized in the kingdom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How strange. I was told that there's only one national religion that was recognized in the kingdom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But their doctrine cannot save anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But their doctrine cannot save anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But their doctrine cannot save anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Magnum Opus. The Golden Dawn knows alchemy that can transmute Mana Stones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Magnum Opus. The Golden Dawn knows alchemy that can transmute Mana Stones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Magnum Opus. The Golden Dawn knows alchemy that can transmute Mana Stones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, we are able to bring real salvation to the poor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, we are able to bring real salvation to the poor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, we are able to bring real salvation to the poor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Transmute Mana Stones? How's that possible...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Transmute Mana Stones? How's that possible...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Transmute Mana Stones? How's that possible...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The process is rather simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The process is rather simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The process is rather simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Nigredo</color>. First, it goes through the blackening process.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Nigredo</color>. First, it goes through the blackening process.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Nigredo</color>. First, it goes through the blackening process.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Albedo</color>. Then purified into white.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Albedo</color>. Then purified into white.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Albedo</color>. Then purified into white.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Rubedo</color>. And finally, we transmute them into crimson Mana Stones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Rubedo</color>. And finally, we transmute them into crimson Mana Stones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Rubedo</color>. And finally, we transmute them into crimson Mana Stones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Supernaturals are viewed with hatred in London.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Supernaturals are viewed with hatred in London.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Supernaturals are viewed with hatred in London.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They need Mana Stones to survive, but no one is willing to provide them with costly Mana Stones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They need Mana Stones to survive, but no one is willing to provide them with costly Mana Stones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They need Mana Stones to survive, but no one is willing to provide them with costly Mana Stones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, our order is different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, our order is different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, our order is different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really Mana Stones...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really Mana Stones...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really Mana Stones...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you be willing to join us, Sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you be willing to join us, Sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you be willing to join us, Sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-somebody help me...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-somebody help me...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-somebody help me...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Midnight Killer...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Midnight Killer...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The third one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The third one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The third one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A message was left behind just like <color=#ffd34c>the man</color> said. Next is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A message was left behind just like <color=#ffd34c>the man</color> said. Next is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A message was left behind just like <color=#ffd34c>the man</color> said. Next is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alas, the next offering's location is nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alas, the next offering's location is nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alas, the next offering's location is nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the police are closing in. I need to be more cautious from now on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the police are closing in. I need to be more cautious from now on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the police are closing in. I need to be more cautious from now on.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's best not to get carried away
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's best not to get carried away
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's best not to get carried away
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is you again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is you again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is you again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh, ye woeful fool.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh, ye woeful fool.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh, ye woeful fool.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Decisions may be easy to overturn, but regret remains forever.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Decisions may be easy to overturn, but regret remains forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So stop your foolishness now.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So stop your foolishness now.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Don
8kt make me laugh.

Don
8kt make me laugh.

Don
8kt make me laugh.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The priest said it was over a hundred years old.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's authentic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's authentic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's authentic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Follow me quietly. I know a supplier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Follow me quietly. I know a supplier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Follow me quietly. I know a supplier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is this place...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is this place...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is this place...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome to the temple of the Golden Dawn, pagan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome to the temple of the Golden Dawn, pagan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome to the temple of the Golden Dawn, pagan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Dawn?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Dawn?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Dawn?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How strange. I was told that there's only one national religion that was recognized in the kingdom.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How strange. I was told that there's only one national religion that was recognized in the kingdom.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How strange. I was told that there's only one national religion that was recognized in the kingdom.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But their doctrine cannot save anyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But their doctrine cannot save anyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But their doctrine cannot save anyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Magnum Opus. The Golden Dawn knows alchemy that can transmute Mana Stones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Magnum Opus. The Golden Dawn knows alchemy that can transmute Mana Stones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Magnum Opus. The Golden Dawn knows alchemy that can transmute Mana Stones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, we are able to bring real salvation to the poor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, we are able to bring real salvation to the poor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, we are able to bring real salvation to the poor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Transmute Mana Stones? How's that possible...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Transmute Mana Stones? How's that possible...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Transmute Mana Stones? How's that possible...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The process is rather simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The process is rather simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The process is rather simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Nigredo</color>. First, it goes through the blackening process.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Nigredo</color>. First, it goes through the blackening process.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Nigredo</color>. First, it goes through the blackening process.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Albedo</color>. Then purified into white.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Albedo</color>. Then purified into white.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Albedo</color>. Then purified into white.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Rubedo</color>. And finally, we transmute them into crimson Mana Stones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Rubedo</color>. And finally, we transmute them into crimson Mana Stones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Rubedo</color>. And finally, we transmute them into crimson Mana Stones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Supernaturals are viewed with hatred in London.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Supernaturals are viewed with hatred in London.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Supernaturals are viewed with hatred in London.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They need Mana Stones to survive, but no one is willing to provide them with costly Mana Stones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They need Mana Stones to survive, but no one is willing to provide them with costly Mana Stones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They need Mana Stones to survive, but no one is willing to provide them with costly Mana Stones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, our order is different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, our order is different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, our order is different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really Mana Stones...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really Mana Stones...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really Mana Stones...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would you be willing to join us, Sister?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would you be willing to join us, Sister?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would you be willing to join us, Sister?

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-somebody help me...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-somebody help me...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-somebody help me...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Midnight Killer...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Midnight Killer...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The third one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The third one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The third one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A message was left behind just like <color=#ffd34c>the man</color> said. Next is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A message was left behind just like <color=#ffd34c>the man</color> said. Next is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A message was left behind just like <color=#ffd34c>the man</color> said. Next is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alas, the next offering's location is nearby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Alas, the next offering's location is nearby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alas, the next offering's location is nearby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the police are closing in. I need to be more cautious from now on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the police are closing in. I need to be more cautious from now on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the police are closing in. I need to be more cautious from now on.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
It's best not to get carried away
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
It's best not to get carried away
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
It's best not to get carried away
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is you again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is you again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is you again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh, ye woeful fool.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh, ye woeful fool.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh, ye woeful fool.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Decisions may be easy to overturn, but regret remains forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Decisions may be easy to overturn, but regret remains forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Decisions may be easy to overturn, but regret remains forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So stop your foolishness now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So stop your foolishness now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So stop your foolishness now.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Don
8kt make me laugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Don
8kt make me laugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Don
8kt make me laugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until all vengeance is fulfilled... Until I'm reunited with the child who died unjustly...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Until all vengeance is fulfilled... Until I'm reunited with the child who died unjustly...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Until all vengeance is fulfilled... Until I'm reunited with the child who died unjustly...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will not stop! No matter what...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will not stop! No matter what...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will not stop! No matter what...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
